info.title: LendyPH API
info.description: REST API for LendyPH Lending Application

get.description: Get paginated audit logs with optional filters
Get a specific audit log entry

post.description: Authenticate with username or email and receive an access token

get.description: Get the authenticated user profile with roles and permissions

post.description: Revoke current token and issue a new one

get.description: Get a paginated list of borrowers with search and filters
Get full borrower profile with co-makers and documents

delete.description: Permanently delete a borrower and all related records

get.description: Get all branches
Get a specific branch
Returns all financial terms, deductions, and amortization schedule for printing/display
Get document metadata and URL
Returns the API health status

patch.summary: Apply an approved adjustment to the loan

put.description: Update loan application (only if draft or for_review)

patch.description: Release an approved loan — generates loan account number and amortization schedule

get.description: Compute and return amortization schedule without persisting

get.summary: View persisted amortization schedule with payment tracking
get.description: Returns the saved amortization schedule with beginning balance, paid amounts, penalties, and status per installment. Includes summary totals.

409.description: Cannot delete — loans reference this product

get.description: Returns borrower promise-to-pay data, co-maker details, loan terms, and signature fields
Returns outstanding balance, overdue amounts, next due date, and payment totals
All transactions, schedule, and balance for a specific loan
All loans with balances and payment history for a borrower
Paginated list of released loans with filters
Paginated list of repayments with filters
Schedules that are due or overdue as of today
Aggregate portfolio, outstanding, and overdue amounts by branch
Get all roles with their permissions
Get a specific role with permissions
Get a paginated list of all users
Get a specific user by ID
